pages.text: $(o)"Burning is not destruction — burning is what power looks like when it's loose."$()$(br2)$(#FF4400)Pyromancers$() hold that heat is truth: only under fierce reaction does matter reveal what it is.

pages.title: Creed
pages.text: $(l)Pyromancer$()'s three precepts:$(br2)1. $(l)When in doubt, burn it$()$(br)2. $(l)Anything not consumed is a debt$()$(br)3. $(l)Even fire breathes — rhythm is will$()$(br2)Primary element: $(l)Fire$(); minor affinities: $(l)Lightning$(), $(l)Blood$().

pages.title: History
pages.text: Pyromancy split off from the ancient $(l)Alchemists' Conclave$(). The Conclave prized precision, but one faction argued that "excessive precision is stagnation" — they took the formulae, burned the library, and renamed themselves after fire.$(br2)Modern Pyromancers inherit that fierceness: fast decisions, heavy firepower, deep scars.
